text.title: Ruby Sorbet Strict Floor with Tapioca RBI Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: init-sorbet
step.action: Add sorbet + sorbet-runtime; run `bundle exec srb init`.

step.name: init-tapioca
step.action: `bundle exec tapioca init`; generate gem + DSL RBIs; commit.

step.name: sigil-floor
step.action: Add `# typed: true` to every existing file; pre-commit hook for new files.
